items.title: Tax Incentive · Innovation Class A
items.description: 30% capex rebate, 5-year holiday on AI infra spend. Notified under Notice 014/2026.

items.title: Founder Residency Subsidy
items.description: 60% rebate on Founder Housing for the first 24 months. Sector A & B units.

items.title: Startup Policy Access · AP
items.description: Direct line to AP DPIIT cell. Pre-clearance on incentive applications under 7 days.

items.title: Investor Office Hours
items.description: Curated weekly office hours with Sequoia, Peak XV, Lightspeed India, AP Innovation Fund.

items.title: District Mentor Network
items.description: Sector mentors across AI, GovTech, Climate. 6 mentor hours allotted per month.

items.title: Legal Desk · Direct Line
items.description: 11-day enterprise contract turnaround. AP-state precedent templates.

items.title: Fast-Track Approvals
items.description: 9-day average processing for founder visas, permit renewals, expansion applications.

items.title: AP Skills Fund Access
items.description: Up to ₹50 Lakh per year for AP engineering hires + university partnerships.

items.title: AP Data Corridor
items.description: Direct ingest from Andhra Pradesh datasets — health, mobility, agriculture — under research clauses.

items.title: Series-A Expansion Grant
items.description: Matching capex grant of up to ₹2 Cr at Series A. Filed against quarterly milestones.

items.title: Global Trade Corridor
items.description: Pre-cleared export channel for AI services. Singapore, UAE, US.

items.title: Sovereign AI Pilot
items.description: Government-of-AP pilot deployments. Gated to Policy Tier 03.
